allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for run in data.get\(''workflow_runs'', []\): print\(f""Run #{run[''run_number'']}: {run[''conclusion'']} - {run[''head_commit''][''message''].split\(chr\(10\)\)[0]}""\) print\(f"" URL: {run[''html_url'']}""\) print\(f"" ID: {run[''id'']}""\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for job in data.get\(''jobs'', []\): print\(f""{job[''name'']}: {job[''conclusion'']} \({job[''status'']}\)""\) if job[''conclusion''] == ''failure'': for step in job.get\(''steps'', []\): if step.get\(''conclusion''\) == ''failure'': print\(f"" FAILED step: {step[''name'']}""\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for job in data.get\(''jobs'', []\): if job[''name''] == ''Build \(macos-14\)'': print\(f""Job ID: {job[''id'']}""\) print\(f""URL: {job[''html_url'']}""\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for job in data.get\(''jobs'', []\): if ''macos'' in job[''name'']: print\(''Job ID:'', job[''id'']\) print\(''URL:'', job[''html_url'']\) ")
